'''âj-b-d''' ('''jabada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hen|hen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hen|hen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-b-d
|-
! Lemma
| jabada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jabadithi|jabadithi]] || [[word:jabadiji|jabadiji]] || [[word:jabadishi|jabadishi]] || [[word:jabadi|jabadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jabaduthuth|jabaduthuth]] || [[word:jabadujuj|jabadujuj]] || [[word:jabadushush|jabadushush]] || [[word:jabad|jabad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabaduthu|jabaduthu]] || [[word:jabaduju|jabaduju]] || [[word:jabadushu|jabadushu]] || [[word:jabadu|jabadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabadufuth|jabadufuth]] || [[word:jabadufuj|jabadufuj]] || [[word:jabadufush|jabadufush]] || [[word:jabaduf|jabaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jabadethe|jabadethe]] || [[word:jabadeje|jabadeje]] || [[word:jabadeshe|jabadeshe]] || [[word:jabade|jabade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jabadothoth|jabadothoth]] || [[word:jabadojoj|jabadojoj]] || [[word:jabadoshosh|jabadoshosh]] || [[word:jabad|jabad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabadotho|jabadotho]] || [[word:jabadojo|jabadojo]] || [[word:jabadosho|jabadosho]] || [[word:jabado|jabado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabadofoth|jabadofoth]] || [[word:jabadofoj|jabadofoj]] || [[word:jabadofosh|jabadofosh]] || [[word:jabadof|jabadof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jabadĂŻf|jabadĂŻf]] || [[word:jabadĂŻf|jabadĂŻf]] || [[word:jabadĂŻf|jabadĂŻf]] || [[word:jabadĂŻf|jabadĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jabadĂŻfĂŻf|jabadĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:jabadĂŻfĂŻf|jabadĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:jabadĂŻfĂŻf|jabadĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:jabadĂŻfĂŻf|jabadĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabadĂŻf|jabadĂŻf]] || [[word:jabadĂŻf|jabadĂŻf]] || [[word:jabadĂŻf|jabadĂŻf]] || [[word:jabadĂŻf|jabadĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabadĂŻf|jabadĂŻf]] || [[word:jabadĂŻf|jabadĂŻf]] || [[word:jabadĂŻf|jabadĂŻf]] || [[word:jabadĂŻf|jabadĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jabadĂŠthĂŠ|jabadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jabadĂŠjĂŠ|jabadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jabadĂŠshĂŠ|jabadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jabadĂŠ|jabadĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jabadathath|jabadathath]] || [[word:jabadajaj|jabadajaj]] || [[word:jabadashash|jabadashash]] || [[word:jabad|jabad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabadatha|jabadatha]] || [[word:jabadaja|jabadaja]] || [[word:jabadasha|jabadasha]] || [[word:jabada|jabada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabadafath|jabadafath]] || [[word:jabadafaj|jabadafaj]] || [[word:jabadafash|jabadafash]] || [[word:jabadaf|jabadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jabadasha|jabadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojabadasha|gojabadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijabadasha|gokijabadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jabadnĂŒsha|jabadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojabadnknĂŒsha|gojabadnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijabadnĂŒsha|gokijabadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jabadshĂ«sha|jabadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojabadnkshĂ«sha|gojabadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijabadshĂ«sha|gokijabadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jabadrosha|jabadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojabadnkrosha|gojabadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijabadrosha|gokijabadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jabadmusha|jabadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojabadnkmusha|gojabadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijabadmusha|gokijabadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jabadsherasha|jabadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojabadnksherasha|gojabadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijabadsherasha|gokijabadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jabadngasha|jabadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojabadnkngasha|gojabadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijabadngasha|gokijabadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jabadyasha|jabadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojabadnkyasha|gojabadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijabadyasha|gokijabadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jabadyamasha|jabadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojabadnkyamasha|gojabadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijabadyamasha|gokijabadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jabadnĂŒshĂ«sha|jabadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojabadnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gojabadnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijabadnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokijabadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jabadnĂŒrosha|jabadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojabadnknĂŒrosha|gojabadnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijabadnĂŒrosha|gokijabadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jabadnĂŒmusha|jabadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojabadnknĂŒmusha|gojabadnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijabadnĂŒmusha|gokijabadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jabadshĂ«nĂŒsha|jabadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojabadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gojabadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijabadshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokijabadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jabadshĂ«rosha|jabadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojabadnkshĂ«rosha|gojabadnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijabadshĂ«rosha|gokijabadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jabadshĂ«musha|jabadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojabadnkshĂ«musha|gojabadnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijabadshĂ«musha|gokijabadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jabadronĂŒsha|jabadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojabadnkronĂŒsha|gojabadnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijabadronĂŒsha|gokijabadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jabadroshĂ«sha|jabadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojabadnkroshĂ«sha|gojabadnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijabadroshĂ«sha|gokijabadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jabadromusha|jabadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojabadnkromusha|gojabadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijabadromusha|gokijabadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jabadmunĂŒsha|jabadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojabadnkmunĂŒsha|gojabadnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijabadmunĂŒsha|gokijabadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jabadmushĂ«sha|jabadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojabadnkmushĂ«sha|gojabadnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijabadmushĂ«sha|gokijabadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jabadmurosha|jabadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojabadnkmurosha|gojabadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijabadmurosha|gokijabadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jabad|jabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:jĂŠbĂŠd|jĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojabad|hojabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hojĂŠbĂŠd|hojĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojabad|hohojabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojĂŠbĂŠd|hohojĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒjabad|nĂŒjabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒjĂŠbĂŠd|nĂŒjĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjabad|nĂŒnĂŒjabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠbĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻjabad|nĂŻjabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻjĂŠbĂŠd|nĂŻjĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjabad|nĂŻnĂŻjabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠbĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujabad|lujabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lujĂŠbĂŠd|lujĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujabad|lulujabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujĂŠbĂŠd|lulujĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijabad|lijabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lijĂŠbĂŠd|lijĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijabad|lilijabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijĂŠbĂŠd|lilijĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojabad|kojabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kojĂŠbĂŠd|kojĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojabad|kokojabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojĂŠbĂŠd|kokojĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejabad|kejabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kejĂŠbĂŠd|kejĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejabad|kekejabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejĂŠbĂŠd|kekejĂŠbĂŠd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
